svg.title: PayRead architecture diagram
svg.desc: Architecture of PayRead showing 4 Soroban contracts, Next.js frontend pages, Freighter wallet, and Stellar testnet network with data flow arrows between them.

g.text: Signs XDR · never exposes private key
